tool.name: Convert COCO to JSON AnyLabeling
tool.description: Convert COCO annotations to LabelMe JSON format

param.name: path_mode
param.label: Image path configuration
param.help: Define how the 'imagePath' field will be generated in the output JSON.

param.name: simple_info
param.help: The imagePath will be set to '../filename'.

param.name: anylabeling_info
param.help: The imagePath will follow AnyLabeling conventions using Galaxy's input_images directory.

param.name: custom_image_path
param.label: Custom base path
param.help: Define a custom base path for imagePath (e.g. '../outputs'). The filename will be appended automatically.

tool.help:
This tool converts COCO annotation format into LabelMe JSON format.
Inputs: - COCO JSON file containing images, annotations, and categories. - AnyLabeling option: - true: imagePath will point to ../input_images/ - false: imagePath will point to ../
Outputs: - A directory containing one LabelMe JSON file per image.
Notes: - Supports polygon segmentation only. - Each annotation is converted into a LabelMe shape.
